patch.value: Production readiness refresh for pm-changelog sourcemap fix

Perform a full production readiness pass for pm-changelog: fix sourcemaps (issue #4), regenerate CHANGELOG, run all release checks, test in a clean temp folder, and verify no private data in git history.

- GitHub issue #4 resolved
- inlineSources: true in tsconfig.json
- CHANGELOG.md regenerated and correct
- npm run release:check passes
- Clean pm install test passes in temp folder
- No private data in git history
- All commits pushed to main

Production readiness pass complete: sourcemaps fixed, CHANGELOG correct, all release checks pass, temp install verified, no private data in current files.
